name: Savory Salt Substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the ingredients in a small electric coffee grinder, spice grinder, or blender.
2. Grind for 10 seconds or until the mixture is fine.
3. Insert a funnel into the top of a glass salt shaker.
4. Pour the mixture into the shaker and tap the funnel lightly to fill it.
5. Cover the rest of the mixture tightly and store in a cool, dark, dry place.
6. Makes about 1/2 cup.
7. Nutrition data per teaspoon: 6 calories, no fat, no cholesterol, 1 g complex carbohydrates, 1 mg sodium.
